name: contract
summary: Meta-feature owning all cross-feature templates, schemas, dispatch scripts, and enforcement checks (hard-rules R1-R9, naming-convention).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes a native workflow contract mechanism
spec_no_change_reason: Spec Inv 41, 47, and 56 were committed in the preceding spec-update step (commit 27d2f0ec via the prior cycle and 182d63f2); this sub-cycle implements the declared schema enum extension, lib/runtime APIs, and contract feature.json manifest+runtime entries.
